II

The was no meeting the next day. Unexpectedly Julio had absented one week from work “for urgent work matters”. That was the Corporative email sent to notify the officers and managers to take due matters.

Eva had received a copy and she was reading it from top to bottom, looking for some hidden message on it but there was none, just a list of instructions to comply. Days passed by between fine plates, trivial conversations with Andrea and one or another skin-curtail date. In one word: normal.

She would try to focus but she would also stared at her cell phone. Nothing was the same. Should she text him? It’s better not to tempt her faith. This job was everything she dreamed of and she wouldn’t want to lose it for a silly mistake. Maybe it was all a product of her hungry imagination. So she gave it up.

The elevator would bring her up to the top story of the most modern of the block and perhaps the whole city. She was getting acquainted to the black everlasting-clean carpet, the fine wood furniture and the marvelous view to the city.

The office was quiet but she felt as if there was something there.

-  Maybe it’s my imagination.

She said to herself without realizing that Julio was sitting on his chair reading one of the memos Eva drafted.

She passed by and he greeted her.

-  Hello, Eva. Long time no see.

She reacted surprised with a small hop and put her hands on her chest.

-  Wow, Mr Julio. What a big scare you gave me. Yes, It’s been some days since we saw the last time.

-  Oh, did I scare you?

He moved his arms towards Eva and stared at her deeply.

-  I’m sorry, Eva. That wasn’t my intention. Honestly.

It was a playful tone but she took it as an offense. It was more like a child’s trick.

-  Are you ok?

-  Yeah, yeah. How was your trip?

-  Well, I’m tired to be honest. Lots to do and now I have to sit down to do a huge planning. I see you worked ahead the Marketing Department stuff, that’s great, because we need to make an ad campaign and I need everyone’s support ... including yours.

-  You can count with me, Sir.

-  I like your attitude, Eva

He leaned forward her but then he leaned back.

-  I’ll be busy. I’ll call you to create a to do list. There’s a lot of work to do from now on.

-  Ok.

Eva was excited. She felt amazing yearning to see him, to listen his games, the attempts to play with her mind. She sat on her chair and then she felt again heat in her abdomen which was becoming more difficult to cool down.

As Julio stated there was a lot of work to do. In fact, Eva would barely had time to lunch. A sandwich and an iced tea – nothing more. That day there were no conversations nor music to break the silence. There was no time at all.

Eva’s wrists hurt, and her neck and part of her spine. She was longing for a hot tub or a massage. Any of them would be nice.

Julio cameo out of his office, waving goodbye to two investors.

-  It was a pleasure having you both here again. Please come here as much as you want.

Hands shaken and polite goodbyes after Eva and Julio were alone again.

-  This has been a very busy day, don’t you think?

-  Very busy! But we’ve come out of it putting all the tasks needed on time, don’t you think?

-  Sure, sure. Mmmm, is there something bothering you? Are you ok?

-  Yeah, yeah. I’m perfect.

-  Alright because I believe we’ll have to do some extra time.

-  Ok, should I order dinner?

-  Not here, Eva. At my place. It is more comfortable and we’ll be able to finish the job faster. Don’t you think?

-  I said you can count on me for anything.

Julio glimpsed a light smile and leaned toward Eva.

-  Perfect. I’ll let you know so you can prepare your belongings to leave.

Julio walked back to his office. She liked feeling like a prey and he certainly was assuming well his hungry hunter role. She liked his impertinence and she wanted to know how far he would go.

For anybody’s standard this would be scandalous but not for Eva. Throughout her whole life she had been carefree. She loved the art of seduction and she considered herself as an expert on the subject.

She was excited because she had found someone who would not walk out of the deal, and she liked to interact with someone so confident. That she would find delicious.

-  I’m almost ready. I’ll make a call and we’ll leave.

That was the message she was waiting for. She put a small notebook, her agenda and her glasses on her handbag. She would carry on her hands some documents and reports that needed to be checked. Or at least that was the plan.

The both walked out of the office to the elevator. They were waiting in silence with a complicity attitude. The reception was empty except for the night watch.

-  Good night, Hugo.

-  Good night, Mr Larez.

The sky was completely dark and few stars could be seen. The air was fresh and there was some animosity in the people walking down the street.

-  It looks there will be a festival in the park.

-  It’s a nice place, don’t you think?

-  It is. Those festivals are sometimes interesting.

-  There are quite few things that please you, right?

-  Ha ha ha. It sound like a snog, right? The truth? I am, I find quite few things in life are honest so I can get bored quickly.

Julio’s bursting laugh sounded nice and low-pitched. She could notice his white perfect teeth. Her sight became charmer and nicer.

The car appeared on the corner driven by a corporation’s valet driver. It was a matte silver Alpha Romeo MiTo. It looked shinny in contrast with the black asphalt pavement.

Julio walked towards the car, thanked the valet driver and opened the passenger’s door to Eva. She knewed he was inspecting her with a clinical eye. He walked to the driver’s door and entered the car.

The seats where upholstered with black leather, and the glove compartment front was of the same material with metal decorations to stand out from monochromy. The smell was a mixture between business and testosterone.

-  I love speedsters. But this one looks more like a city-car.

-  What do you mean by that?

-  Let me explain ... it has a more modest look. It is kind of funny to see someone flaunting a car because it makes him look like a gangster.

-  I believe it’s an aspect you don’t wish to display.

-  You’re right. And I don’t say it with arrogance but in this industry I realized that people want to see luxury not bad taste. It has an adverse reaction from clients. It’s true, for real, you would be surprised about the power of a good impression in this business.

-  It’s no surprise. A good first impression is important in every place and situation.

-  It’s true, but we could get surprised sometimes.

He stared at her while driving. Eva was worried because he was not concentrated on the street rather on her. She turned her head and was able to recover her flesh color after a tiny heart attack.

Julio was the man that enjoyed testing people’s limits. It was the way he could made them understand that no one had the control of itself all the time. He would enjoy doing it and he did it constantly.

For example, Pedro was one of the quite few close friends that understood this unusual conduct of his. Julio organized a surprise for Pedro and he knew that it would be something it would make him get close to desperation and fear.

-  You’ll like this and it will help you too. You’ll see.

Pedro presaged what it could be.

They arrived to a deserted and apparently isolated area. As getting closer Pedro noticed there were planes.

-  This is your surprise!

It was a parachute tour

For Pedro it was impossible to believe because he suffered of an acute vertigo. The fear was such that he couldn’t make business trips unless they were on a bus or a boat. Besides that, it was impossible.

-  Come on, man! We’ve got all that is needed

For the first time in years Pedro felt he wanted to punch Julio’s face with all his strengths. He was perfectly aware of the fear and pain of leaving the ground Pedro felt.

-  Fuck, Julio! You know I hate all this!

A group of 15 more people and his friend’s encouraging speech made him hop in the plane sweating in tears. Minutes later Pedro would swear while falling with a parachute.

When they all landed Pedro bursted in tears. The fear that he felt for years finally was receding and he felt as if he were getting out of jail.

-  I’m sorry, pal. I know it was too much but I wanted you to move forward with your fears. Can you forgive me?

Pedro stood up. Julio was ready to receive a punch in his face. Pedro walked towards him and hugged him.

-  You’re an asshole, you know that? ... Thanks.

Pedro and Julio remain embracing and laughing as in their University days.

That fighting and lack-of-caution attitude of Julio’s came after a car accident while being a teenager. He was with his parents when a big truck hit them in the front of the car.

The impact was too much for him. The doctors said he would not walk back again and that he should accept that fact. However, no one counted on that he was really stubborn.

His mother died in the accident and his father accompanied him every day to his therapy. Both had suffered acute injuries but they were determined to recover despite the time needed to do so. With that objective in mind Julio spent his last day at the hospital on a football field nearby. The doctors were astonished.

From that day he decided to live every day to its full extent without giving much credit to the consequences. Over time he became he sole heir of a hotel empire and the object of desire of high-class ladies.

He became even more wanted the same year he appeared on the Times magazine cover page as a business model promess and as well on Men’s Health magazine showing a magnificent body thanks to his cross-fit training practiced religiously.

He was smart, attractive and mysterious. An irresistible cocktail. Even when he was on the top of the most wanted bachelors list of the moment Julio was deeply focused on other activities secretly kept for others. When going into BDSM he had to be extremely careful to avoid any leak of information.

This precaution was, however, worthless when he was involved with a wealthy lady. The president of the National Bank. A light-brown skin woman, dark long abundant hair with big breasts and fleshy lips.

They appeared in the first pages and gossip columns of magazines and news cheered by writers and reporters with the idea of them becoming a couple. The truth is that it was all a couple of whipping and rude sex sessions between them. Nothing romantic, at least not for Julio.

Matters starting to get out of control and he decided to put a stop on them to keep good terms amongst them. But it didn’t resulted as planned.

Luckily for him, he could cope the obstacles but he knew he had to take firm steps next time. It was everything ok until he met Eva, his secretary. Thin, white pinky skin, long blonde hair with dark green eyes. He got hooked with her the first momento he met her but discarded the idea of a relationship as she was an employee.

He changed his mind when he saw some particular traces on her wrists. As a good Dominant observer he understood those were rope traces.

-  Well, well ...

At the beginning it was only a suspicion which he later confirmed one day after he allow her to leave home and he saw a trace of a recently done wound. Then he made his calculations.

Because of the situation he wanted to play to be a warrior and started reckoning double-play comments to confirm his suspicions. Eva would answer him as expected and he would become excited. It would still be risky but that did not reduce his willing to go with it.

While he went out on this trip he realized he was really attracted to her. That time spent away was useful to construct the perfect trap for her. Even when he had already felt on it before.

-  What should be check Mr. Julio?

-  Some proposals we received during this week. I didn’t tell you but all this comes to my email and I haven’t had the time to evaluate them with calm. Just one week of absence and everything piles up.

-  Ok, let me take notes.

-  Another thing we must do is...

Julio was speaking but Eva imagined being tied up by him. It was a state of complete vulnerability and giving out that made him desirable. She would imagine him naked and she would try to imagine the rest of his skin and if his sight would still be cold or full of fire with her.

-  Did you understand?

-  Yes, perfect.

They were approaching to a residential area that at Eva’s eyes was really exclusive. The houses were huge and with an impressive architecture. Some were Mediterranean-style and other more futurists and modern.

Julio decelerated and turned to a black iron fence that opened with a remote control he took out of his inside jacket pocket. They both entered and passed by a driveway with trees and bushes alongside. Soon Eva could see a three-story white house with big windows.

Julio parked by the entrance. Eva was mesmerized by the house.

-  Welcome.

-  It is a nice place.
